meta.purpose: Final Release Lock — Production Freeze Layer
meta.series: V5.9 TERMINAL — No further evolution allowed within V5.9 series

release_seal.system: AR游伴 V5.9 Visual Execution System
release_seal.message: V5.9 series is TERMINAL. No further modifications allowed. Any change requires V6.0+ version upgrade.

step_1_system_immutability_declaration.constraint: Any change to any of these modules REQUIRES V6.0+ version upgrade
step_1_system_immutability_declaration.enforcement: RELEASE_SEAL.terminal = true. Module declarations frozen via Object.freeze().

stage_0.name: state
stage_0.description: Source state — raw app/world state object

stage_1.name: visualEngine
stage_1.description: Sole orchestrator — accepts manifestEvents, produces renderTree

stage_2.name: stateVisualMap
stage_2.description: Maps raw world state to display-safe visual parameters

stage_3.name: centralResonanceRenderer
stage_3.description: Background + atmosphere. Never mutates layout or introduces UI nodes.

stage_4.name: renderTreeBuilder
stage_4.description: Builds scenicLayers from raw scenic points

stage_5.name: UI
stage_5.description: Final output — renderTree consumed by WXML

step_2_visual_execution_pipeline_freeze.constraint: NO SKIPS, NO BRANCHES, NO ALTERNATE PATHS
step_2_visual_execution_pipeline_freeze.enforcement: validatePipelineExecution() rejects any missing, out-of-order, or extra stages

tone.description: Awareness mode changes text tone, never layout structure

glowIntensity.description: centralResonanceRenderer glow level, never layout structure

activationLevel.description: World memory activation level, adds subtle pulse effect only

step_3_dynamic_ui_variability_eliminatio.constraint: ALLOWED: state-driven visual parameters (tone only, not structure). FORBIDDEN: everything else.

step_4_cross_page_uniformity.design_principle: Different views of the same world system

shared_structure.hero: Every page has a hero focal point (title + kicker + subtitle)
shared_structure.secondary: Every page has a secondary content flow (sections or flowRelics)
shared_structure.background: Every page has a background context (atmosphere or empty state)

shared_behavior.renderPipeline: state → visualEngine → stateVisualMap → centralResonanceRenderer → renderTreeBuilder → UI
shared_behavior.emptyState: All pages use <empty-state> component with world narrative language

step_4_cross_page_uniformity.enforcement: validateCrossPageUniformity() checks hero presence on every page renderTree

patterns_checked: listDominance — arrays without hero context at top of renderTree
dashboard — 4+ metric/numeric fields at top level without narrative framing
gridExplosion — multiple flat arrays of 5+ items with no hero
spacingInconsistency — top-level keys with rpx values outside locked scale
multiHierarchy — 2+ nested objects each containing hero-like fields

auto_normalization.features: preserves activeTab, adds _productionFallback flag, zeros all other fields

guarantees.requirement: Same state always produces same renderTree
Identical state input → identical visual output
guarantees.mechanism: renderTree is deep-cloned from cache; no side effects in pipeline
guarantees.enforced_by: visual_rc_freeze.js — cache hit returns deep clone

guarantees.mechanism: All spacing/typography in rpx units; no device-specific branching

guarantees.requirement: Null/undefined state always produces safe UI
guarantees.mechanism: enforceDriftBlock() → V5.9 base template; enforceSystemLockdown() → SAFE_RENDER_TREE

guarantees.requirement: No runtime mutation, no inline branching, no conditional layout
guarantees.mechanism: All display logic precomputed in buildPageData(). WXML has NO operators.
guarantees.enforced_by: UI_LINT_RULES in visual_consistency_guard.js + WXML operator audit

evidence: RELEASE_SEAL.terminal = true
10 modules declared IMMUTABLE and productionLocked
All modules require V6.0+ for modification
17 experimental paths blocked across 4 categories
Experimental path blocklist frozen at module level
Only V5.9 CORE visual system is active
Cross-page uniformity contract enforced: ALL pages share hero + secondary + background structure
All shared tokens LOCKED (color, spacing, typography, card, glow)
Shared behavior enforced: single render pipeline, single data contract, single empty state system
Deterministic rendering guaranteed by memoization layer
Identical state → identical output guaranteed by deep-clone cache
Zero layout randomness: all decisions precomputed in buildPageData(), WXML has no branching logic
enforceDriftBlock() returns V5.9 base template on any drift
enforceSystemLockdown() returns SAFE_RENDER_TREE on any violation
normalizeToProductionTemplate() returns safe template on regression
Null/undefined/malformed state → never blank screen, always safe fallback
Beta readiness verified (V5.9.7): all 8 steps passed
RC freeze verified (V5.9.8): all 43 tests passed
Production lock verified (V5.9.9): all 42 tests passed
Zero blocking issues
All 6 core pages have structure, fallback, visual hierarchy, no engineering UI

summary.final_verdict: V5.9 series is TERMINAL. System is PRODUCTION LOCKED and ready for real user deployment. Any further modification requires V6.0+ version upgrade.
